overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a rainy New Orleans-style historic district. The character moves along wet streets and covered sidewalks lined with French Quarter architecture, palm trees, and vintage 1960s-era cars while pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the light rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with historic row houses

events.description: character steps from wet street onto covered sidewalk under green and white striped awning

agents.ego_description: character in tan jacket walks briskly along the wet street, moving toward the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: woman in dress walking under the awning while holding an umbrella

entered.detail: row of historic stone buildings with wrought iron balconies and arched windows
tall palm trees lining the center median of the street
1960s era sedans and convertibles parked along the curb
green and white striped canvas awning extending over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character walking through a rainy historic district street. Wet asphalt reflects the overcast sky as the character moves past parked vintage cars and palm trees. Around 8 seconds, the character transitions onto a covered sidewalk beneath a green and white striped awning, entering a more sheltered space while historic buildings with wrought iron balconies line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with storefront awnings

events.description: character passes a red telephone booth on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily under the covered sidewalk, passing pedestrians and street furniture

notable_agents.action: man in blue shirt walking away from camera under the awning

entered.detail: classic red telephone booth with glass panels and 'TELEPHONE' signage
black metal public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking under the protective cover of the striped awning, the character moves along the brick sidewalk. The space is semi-enclosed with the awning overhead providing shelter from the rain. A distinctive red telephone booth appears on the right around 16 seconds, while pedestrians share the covered walkway. The historic buildings continue to line the street, their balconies visible above the awning.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and crosses the street toward the opposite sidewalk
character reaches opposite side and enters another covered walkway section

agents.ego_description: character crosses the wet street at a crosswalk, navigating around pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress holding an umbrella while walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign with white lettering at the street corner
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the wet asphalt
continuous covered sidewalk with overhead protection and hanging plants

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered section, the character moves along the open sidewalk before reaching a crosswalk around 32 seconds. The character crosses the wet street, passing a prominent stop sign at the corner. Pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the sidewalk, and the character enters another covered walkway section on the opposite side, continuing through the historic district.

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily under the covered walkway, passing pedestrians and storefront entrances

notable_agents.action: man with black umbrella walking toward the camera under the covered walkway

entered.detail: decorative black wrought iron railings on second floor balconies of the buildings
ground level shop fronts with large windows and entrance doors

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking under a continuous covered walkway with wrought iron balconies overhead. The sidewalk is protected from the rain, with storefronts lining the right side. The character passes pedestrians moving in the opposite direction, including a man with a black umbrella, while the historic architecture continues to define the streetscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy historic district, transitioning from open, wet streets into a series of sheltered, architectural walkways. It begins with the character walking along wet asphalt that reflects an overcast sky, passing vintage cars and palm trees before stepping under the protection of a green and white striped awning. As the character moves along the brick sidewalk beneath this cover, the scene passes a distinctive red telephone booth and pedestrians sharing the semi-enclosed space. The camera then follows the character as they exit the shelter to cross a rain-slicked street at a prominent stop sign, navigating past umbrellas before entering another covered section on the opposite side. Finally, the movement continues under a long stretch of wrought iron balconies and storefronts, passing pedestrians in the rain as the historic architecture defines the remaining path.
